mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_drug (user_id, drug_id, drug_name, status, drug_form, drug_unit_type, drug_unit_value, start_date, end_date, reminder_start_date, frequency_type, days_interval, days_inweek, times_aday, notes, quantity) values ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{drugForm,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{drugUnitType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{drugUnitValue,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reminderStartDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{frequencyType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{daysInterval,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{daysInWeek,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{timesAday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update:
update kh_user_drug set
drug_id = null,
drug_id = #{drugId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
drug_name = #{drugName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
drug_form = #{drugForm,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
drug_unit_type = #{drugUnitType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
drug_unit_value = #{drugUnitValue,jdbcType=INTEGER},
start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reminder_start_date = #{reminderStartDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
frequency_type = #{frequencyType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
days_interval = #{daysInterval,jdbcType=INTEGER},
days_inweek = #{daysInWeek,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
times_aday = #{timesAday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
notes = #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, drug_id, drug_name, status, drug_form, drug_unit_type, drug_unit_value, start_date, end_date, reminder_start_date, frequency_type, days_interval, days_inweek, times_aday, quantity, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_user_drug where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id, user_id, drug_id, drug_name, status, drug_form, drug_unit_type, drug_unit_value, start_date, end_date, reminder_start_date, frequency_type, days_interval, days_inweek, times_aday, quantity, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_user_drug where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and status != 3 order by create_time desc
